content.en:
With the development of the human domain, the origin of the entire human domain is also strengthened.

Because Ye Tian had integrated many of the Supreme Dao Void Demons he had killed into the Human Domain, he sacrificed them to the Origin of the Human Domain.

He even sacrificed many of the Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demons he had killed to the Human Domain Origin, and continued to grow the Human Domain Origin.

It's like Su Yu, why is it so powerful, Su Yu was just a small Innate Origin Domain at the beginning, but he sacrificed too many Supreme Dao Void Demons, which strengthened Su Yu.

The reason why many fortresses want to buy the corpses of the Supreme Dao Void Demons and exchange the corpses for battle merits is also because of this, they are all integrating the Supreme Dao Void Demons into one innate origin domain after another, and strengthening the innate origin domain.

And the Supreme Dao Void Demon also knew this, but he didn't stop it.

For them, these innate primordial domains have grown, and there are many benefits for breaking through them in the future.

Gradually, the cultivation environment of the human realm was more than ten times better than at the beginning, and many strange lands were also born, and many precious resources were also born, and even the eightfold Dao realm was of great help.

Therefore, in today's human realm, it is not too difficult to become the eightfold supreme realm.

And.

Ye Tian also opened the exchange task in the Terran Temple, as long as he collected enough resources, he could exchange the sixth sequence of Dao rule items from the Terran Temple.

this day.

The Taisu Palace Master of the Taisu Palace gathered enough resources to exchange for a sixth-sequence supreme path rule item in the Terran Temple, and then went to comprehend the sixth-sequence supreme path rule.

If she could comprehend it, she would be able to break through to the Eightfold Dao Realm.

After some time.

The Taisu Palace Master successfully comprehended the Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, and then she began to attack the Eightfold Supreme Dao Realm.

Rumble!!!!

The Taisu Palace produced an astonishing vision, which was a sign of breaking through to the Eightfold Dao Realm, and a large amount of Heaven and Earth Origin was integrated into the body of the Taisu Palace Lord, helping her break through to the Eightfold Dao Realm.

"Finally broke through to the Eightfold Dao Realm!"

The Taisu Palace Master was very excited.

Countless years of penance are all aimed at breaking through to the eightfold realm of the Dao realm.

In the era of the reign of the Wuji Heavenly Palace, she didn't dare to think that she would be able to step into this realm one day, but now she has achieved it.

"Thanks to Ye Tian!"

The Taisu Palace Lord said secretly.

Moreover, the strength of the Taisu Palace's current sevenfold Dao realm is far surpassing.

In the past, Taisu Palace had only a few sevenfold Dao realms, but now it has reached thirty.

Of course, compared to the human race, Taisu Palace is still much weaker.

After all, Ye Tian came from the Terran race, and it was naturally normal to strengthen the Terran race.

......

The human domain, somewhere void.

One area began to twist, as if a violent collision was going on.

Click!!!!

The void began to shatter.

Suddenly, a cracked arm poked out of the void, shattering the space-time of the area, and fragments of many seals splattered out.

Rumble!!!!!

A scarred figure stepped out.

He is the Infinite Heavenly Emperor.

"Hahaha, I, the Wuji Heavenly Emperor, have finally broken the seal, Taibai Sword Master, you want to seal me for countless years, dreaming. You underestimate me too much, although my strength is not as good as yours, but my mastery is not bad. "

Wuji Heavenly Emperor laughed and laughed.

Of course, let him go to the trouble of the Taibai Sword Master, he wouldn't dare.

However, it is impossible for the Taibai Sword Lord to still be here, and he has long since left.

"Taisu Palace, you dare to ask the Taibai Sword Lord to suppress me, if you are not dead, I will send you to die!"

He went straight to Taisu Palace.

He didn't want to go back to Wuji Heavenly Palace to repair, in case the news spread and Taisu Palace invited the Taibai Sword Master again, it would be troublesome.

Therefore, as soon as he got out of trouble, he went directly to kill the group of women of the Taisu Palace Master.

By then, it would be too late for the Taibai Sword Lord to know.

Anyway, the Taibai Sword Master wouldn't kill him, so he wasn't afraid.

Moreover, there is a high probability that the Taibai Sword Lord has nothing to do with Taisu Palace, and he will not attack him again.

......

Along.

The Infinite Heavenly Emperor kept shuttling, but he felt that something was wrong.

"No, how did the origin of the Infinite Domain grow so much, and the energy has also risen a lot?"

"Could it be that some amazing chance was born in the Infinite Domain?"

"No matter, let's destroy Taisu Palace first!"

Suddenly.

He saw the six Sevenfold Soltoes shuttling through the Dao Realm together, and he was sure that he hadn't seen these six Sevenfold Dao Realms.

"It may be that the Supreme Dao Realm of other Innate Origin Domain Alliances has come to the Infinite Domain. "

The Infinite Heavenly Emperor thought so.

Soon.

He came to Taisu Palace.

But suddenly, his face changed.

There were as many as thirty Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realms in Taisu Palace, which was even more than the Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm in Wuji Heavenly Palace.

When did Taisu Palace become so powerful?

He remembered that it hadn't been long since he had been sealed, and it was only a few hundred thousand Dao eras.

"Kill!"

The Wuji Heavenly Emperor didn't care, and did it directly.

Rumble!

An eightfold Supreme Dao realm stopped the Wuji Heavenly Emperor and fought with the Wuji Heavenly Emperor.

"Taisu Palace Master, you have broken through to the Eightfold Dao Realm???"

The Infinite Heavenly Emperor was surprised.

"Wuji Heavenly Emperor, have you broken through the seal?" The Taisu Palace Lord was also a little surprised, it seemed that the Taibai Sword Lord's sealing methods were not too powerful, so that the Wuji Heavenly Emperor had lifted the seal so much in advance.

"Taisu Palace Master, even if you break through to the Eightfold Dao Realm, it is only a preliminary breakthrough, and the Sixth Sequence Extreme Dao Rules you have comprehended are only a single realm, not my opponent!"

He felt that he was desperate, and he could still kill the Taisu Palace Master, and if he let the Taisu Palace Master grow up, he would not necessarily be an opponent.

"Wuji Heavenly Emperor, if you dare to attack our Taisu Palace, you are simply looking for death!"

The Taisu Palace Lord sneered.

"Looking for death, can you kill me? Even if you look for the Taibai Sword Master, he may not be able to come in time. The Infinite Heavenly Emperor sneered.

But at this moment.

The surrounding void solidifies, and everything is still.

The Infinite Heavenly Emperor found that he couldn't move.

"I've seen the Leaf Domain Lord!"

The Taisu Palace Lord said respectfully.

"Ye Tian!" "Wuji Heavenly Emperor naturally knew Ye Tian and personally killed his clone.

But now, Ye Tian's cultivation is actually ......

"Nine Levels to the Dao Realm, how could he break through so quickly?"

The Nine Folds Dao Realm, which took the path of the strongest to the Dao, was countless times stronger than the strength of the Taibai Sword Lord.

How could such a great existence appear in the Infinite Domain!

Moreover, he couldn't understand the power of the Supreme Dao rules that appeared on Ye Tian's body.

He had seen a Ninefold Supreme Dao Realm make a move, and the fourth sequence Supreme Dao rules that the other party had comprehended were far inferior to Ye Tian's rules.

"Wuji Heavenly Emperor, you openly attacked Taisu Palace, violating the rules I specified, and now wipe you out!"

Ye Tian waved his hand, and a wisp of the second sequence of supreme dao rules instantly pierced through the body of the Infinite Heavenly Emperor, completely obliterating it.

There is no hope of resurrecting the patriarch unless it costs a great deal.

But that's impossible!
